channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NHIT] National Highways Infra Trust Approves Private Placement of Units at Rs. 153 Each
item.description:
National Highways Infra Trust has informed the Exchange about the disclosure of a material issue. The Board of Directors of National Highways Infra Investment Managers Private Limited, acting as the Investment Manager to National Highways Infra Trust, held a meeting on Monday, 23rd March, 2026. The Board considered and approved the proposed Private Placement of the Units of National Highways Infra Trust. The Issue closing of Institutional Placement of NHIT was on Monday, 23rd March, 2025. The Issue Price of Rs. 153 was determined and approved for both the Institutional Placement and the Preferential Issue of the units of NHIT. The Board Meeting commenced at 09:00 p.m. and concluded at 11:00 p.m.

  • National Highways Infra Trust approved the Private Placement of the Units of National Highways Infra Trust
  • The Issue Price of Rs. 153 was determined and approved for both the Institutional Placement and the Preferential Issue
  • The Institutional Placement of NHIT closed on Monday, 23rd March, 2025

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Highways Infra Trust | Category: Investment

item.title: [BHEEMACEM] Bheema Cements Ltd Appoints Surabhi Agrawal & Associates as Secretarial Auditor for FY 2023-24 and 2024-25
item.description:
Bheema Cements Ltd has appointed M/s Surabhi Agrawal & Associates as the secretarial auditor for the financial years 2023-24 and 2024-25. The appointment was made at the board meeting held on March 23, 2026. The company also approved the Directors Reports for the financial years 2022-23, 2023-24, and 2024-25. Surabhi Agrawal & Associates will also serve as the scrutinizer for the upcoming 45th and 46th Annual General Meetings of the Company. The annual book closure of the Register of Members and Share Transfer Books of the Company for the 44th, 45th and 46th Annual General Meetings of the Company will commence from April 21, 2026 till April 27, 2026.

  • Bheema Cements Ltd appoints Surabhi Agrawal & Associates as secretarial auditor for FY 2023-24 and 2024-25
  • Company approves Directors Reports for FY 2022-23, 2023-24, and 2024-25
  • Surabhi Agrawal & Associates to serve as scrutinizer for 45th and 46th Annual General Meetings
  • Annual book closure for 44th, 45th and 46th Annual General Meetings from April 21, 2026 to April 27, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHEEMA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BHEEMACEM] Bheema Cements Ltd Appoints Surabhi Agrawal & Associates as Secretarial Auditor for FY 2023-25
item.description:
Bheema Cements Ltd has appointed M/s Surabhi Agrawal & Associates as the Secretarial Auditor for the Financial Years 2023-24 and 2024-25. The appointment was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on March 23, 2026. The company also approved the Notice of 44th, 45th, and 46th Annual General Meetings, and fixed the cut-off date for remote e-voting for all the resolutions set out in the Notices. The Annual Book Closure of the Register of Members and Share Transfer Books of the Company for the 44th, 45th and 46th Annual General Meetings shall commence from April 21, 2026.

  • Bheema Cements Ltd appoints Surabhi Agrawal & Associates as Secretarial Auditor
  • Appointment is for the Financial Years 2023-24 and 2024-25
  • Company approves Notices for 44th, 45th, and 46th Annual General Meetings
  • Cut-off date for remote e-voting fixed for all resolutions
  • Annual Book Closure of the Register of Members and Share Transfer Books from April 21, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHEEMA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [DSFCL] DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Ltd Closes Trading Window Until After Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Limited has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will commence on Wednesday, April 1, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026, will be communicated in due course. This announcement is directed at all Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and other insiders under the aforementioned Regulations.

  • DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Limited closes trading window from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 results declaration.
  • The closure is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for financial results consideration will be informed in due course.
  • The announcement is targeted at Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and other insiders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram Fine Chemicals Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SYMPHONY] Symphony Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Designated Persons and Their Immediate Relatives
item.description:
Symphony Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and the company's Internal Code for Prevention of Insider Trading, has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in shares of the company by its designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of the audited financial results of the company for the fourth quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and the company's Internal Code for Prevention of Insider Trading
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of the audited financial results of the company for the financial year ending on March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Symphony Limited | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GCONNECT] Gconnect Logitech and Supply Chain Ltd. Announces ₹ 11 Crore Capital Increase and Preferential Issue of Equity Shares
item.description:
Gconnect Logitech and Supply Chain Ltd. held a Board Meeting on March 23, 2026, and approved several key decisions. The company plans to increase its authorized share capital from ₹ 4 crore to ₹ 11 crore, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the company will issue up to 64,83,000 equity shares at a price of ₹ 18.31 per share, including a premium of ₹ 8.31 per share, to promoter and non-promoter category investors on a preferential basis. This issuance will raise approximately ₹ 11,87,03,730. The Extra Ordinary General Meeting of shareholders will be held on April 22, 2026, to seek necessary approvals for these matters.

  • Authorized share capital increase from ₹ 4 crore to ₹ 11 crore
  • Issuance of up to 64,83,000 equity shares at ₹ 18.31 per share
  • Funds raised of approximately ₹ 11,87,03,730
  • Preferential issue to promoter and non-promoter category investors
  • Extra Ordinary General Meeting on April 22, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gconnect Logitech and Supply Chain Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [GCONNECT] Gconnect Logitech and Supply Chain Ltd. Announces Increase in Authorized Share Capital and Preferential Issue of Equity Shares
item.description:
Gconnect Logitech and Supply Chain Limited has informed the exchange about the outcome of the Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026. The Board approved an increase in the authorized share capital from ₹ 4 crore to ₹ 11 crore and a corresponding amendment to Clause V of the Memorandum of Association of the Company. The Board also approved the issuance of up to 64,83,000 (Sixty-Four Lakhs Eighty-Three Thousand) fully paid-up equity shares at a price of ₹ 18.31/- per equity share for an amount aggregating to ₹ 11,87,03,730/-. The equity shares will be issued to 17 investors on a preferential basis, subject to the approval of shareholders and other regulatory approvals.

  • Increase in authorized share capital from ₹ 4 crore to ₹ 11 crore
  • Issuance of up to 64,83,000 fully paid-up equity shares at a price of ₹ 18.31/- per equity share
  • Preferential issue of equity shares to 17 investors
  • Subject to approval of shareholders and other regulatory approvals
  • Amount aggregating to ₹ 11,87,03,730/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gconnect Logitech and Supply Chain Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [JINDALSTEL] Jindal Steel's ESG Score Revised to 51 by ESG Risk.ai
item.description:
Jindal Steel Ltd. has received an intimation from BSE Limited regarding a revision in the ESG score of the company from 50 to 51, as per a disclosure made by ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited (ESG Risk.ai), a SEBI-registered ESG Rating Provider. The company clarifies that it has not engaged ESG Risk.ai for this rating or report, which appears to have been prepared independently by the provider on the basis of information available in the public domain. This disclosure is being made for regulatory clarity and record.

  • Jindal Steel's ESG score revised to 51 by ESG Risk.ai
  • Company did not engage ESG Risk.ai for this rating or report
  • ESG rating appears to be prepared independently by ESG Risk.ai
  • Disclosure made for regulatory clarity and record

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STEEL & POWER LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [SIL] Standard Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window Until Q4 Financial Results in 2026
item.description:
Standard Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Directors, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and Financial Year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider and approve these results will be intimated later.

  • Standard Industries Ltd closes trading window from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure is until 48 hours after Q4 and FY 2026 financial results declaration
  • Applies to Directors, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives
  • The date of the Board Meeting to approve the results will be announced later
  • Trading window closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the Company's Code of Conduct

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STANDARD INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TIDEWATER] Veedol Corporation Extends Unsecured Loan Repayment Deadline for Andrew Yule & Co. Ltd.
item.description:
Veedol Corporation Ltd. has disclosed an extension of the repayment timeline for a short-term unsecured loan provided to Andrew Yule & Co. Ltd. The new repayment date is 30th September, 2026, as approved by the Board of Directors and the Audit Committee. The transaction is carried out on an arm's length basis and in the ordinary course of business. Andrew Yule & Co. Ltd., a Government of India Enterprise and Co-Promoter of Veedol Corporation, has a satisfactory track record in meeting its financial obligations towards the company.

  • Veedol Corporation extends unsecured loan repayment deadline for Andrew Yule & Co. Ltd.
  • New repayment date set for 30th September, 2026
  • Transaction conducted on arm's length basis and in the ordinary course of business
  • Andrew Yule & Co. Ltd. has a satisfactory track record in servicing financial obligations
  • Disclosure made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIDE WATER OIL (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Legal
